footer.description: Every writer's history begins with a tag. TagTales Gallery connects graffiti writers and collectors through exhibitions: original works, limited edition prints, print-on-demand. Zero AI, just original style.
footer.newsletterDesc: Receive exclusive invitations to exhibitions and insights from the Magazine.
footer.newsletterError: Error during subscription. Please try again.
footer.newsletterSuccess: Thank you! You have successfully subscribed.

profile.title: Profile Settings
profile.subtitle: Manage your personal information and preferences.
profile.vatWarning: Warning: The VAT number provided may not be formally valid.
profile.vatConfirm: I confirm that the VAT number is correct and I want to save it
profile.incompleteWarning: Profile saved but incomplete. Please fill out all required fields marked with an asterisk (*).

profileSubtitle: Manage your personal information and preferences.

status.languagePromptMessage: Would you like to browse in another language?

home.writersSubtitle: Discover the writers who shaped the culture.
home.magazineSubtitle: Dive into the culture. Stories, interviews, and archives from the world of graffiti and street art.
home.newsletterSubtitle: Become part of our community. You'll receive updates, invitations to exclusive events, and editorial content directly in your inbox.
home.newsletterPrivacy: I agree to receive updates and promotions via email.

dashboard.subtitle: Here's what's happening with your gallery today.

onboarding.allSet: You're all set! Welcome to TagTales
onboarding.welcome: Welcome! Let's get you set up
onboarding.step1Desc: Add all your details in the settings at the top right (click on the black icon with the first letter of your name). Add your name, bio, VAT number, bank details.
onboarding.step2Desc: Use the chat you find at the bottom, you will receive an email with a Google link, read it, sign it, and then write in the chat that it is ready. The contract will be approved and you will always find it available in the Contracts section
onboarding.step3: Step 3 — Upload texts, images, and videos
onboarding.step3Desc: Follow the instructions found in the contract attachment
onboarding.step4Desc: Our team will complete this step after approving your artworks.

dashboard.salesExcluded: {{count}} sales excluded because they are missing production/shipping costs.

artworks.subtitleAdmin: Manage materials submitted by writers via Google Drive
artworks.subtitleWriter: Upload your audio/video/text materials to the assigned folder on Google Drive. Note: To upload folders, you must have a Google account; if you don't have one, you can create it for free in a short time.
artworks.noMaterialsMessage: There are currently no audio/video materials in the list.
artworks.confirmDeletionMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this project? This operation is irreversible.
artworks.requestModPrompt: Please provide details on what needs to be modified for "{{title}}".
artworks.requestModPlaceholder: E.g., Please upload a higher resolution image.
artworks.title: My Artworks
artworks.rejectReasonPrompt: Please provide a reason for rejecting '{{title}}'. This will be sent to the artist.
artworks.artworkApproved: Artwork "{{title}}" approved and Ecwid product created successfully!
artworks.adminSubtitle: Manage writer submissions and platform portfolio.
artworks.noArtworksDesc: You haven't uploaded any artworks yet, or none match your current filters.
artworks.approvedSuccess: Artwork "{{title}}" approved and Ecwid product created successfully!

uploadArtwork.title: Upload Artwork
uploadArtwork.subtitle: Submit a new piece to your portfolio.
uploadArtwork.successMessage: Artwork submitted successfully! It is now pending approval.
uploadArtwork.errorJpgPng: Only JPG and PNG images are allowed.
uploadArtwork.errorImageSize: Image size must be less than 50MB.
uploadArtwork.errorVideoSize: Video size must be less than 500MB.
uploadArtwork.errorOneImage: Please upload at least one image.
uploadArtwork.descriptionPlaceholder: Tell the story behind this artwork...

sales.missingCostsTooltip: Missing production or shipping costs - Earnings are pending
sales.title: My Sales
sales.subtitle: Track your artwork sales and earnings.

payments.title: Payments
payments.subtitle: Manage your earnings and request payouts.
payments.requestSuccess: Payout requested successfully! We will process it shortly.
payments.balanceTooLow: Your available balance must be at least 500 Euro to request a payout.
payments.infoProcessingTime: Payments are processed within 3-5 business days.
payments.infoBillingDetails: Ensure your billing details in Profile are up to date.
payments.infoValidInvoice: A valid invoice is required for every payout request.
payments.noPaymentsDesc: Your payout requests will appear here.
payments.minPayoutWarning: Minimum payout amount is €{{amount}}. Your current balance is €{{balance}}.
